content: TASK-060 checkpoint done: Fixed Prototype Map height collapse in the playground/static demo. The prototype root now has a 640px minimum height, and #diagram in index.html/examples/demo.html uses a real viewport-derived height instead of min-height only, so map mode fills the available diagram area. Verification: npm run build, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ after switching to Prototype confirmed diagramHeight=1340, prototypeHeight=1340, flowHeight=1308, and no console errors. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
